title: Delhi-Dehradun Expressway Opens: 213 km Corridor Cuts Travel Time to 2.5 Hours, Toll Charges Around Rs 670, Speed Limit-Full Details Inside
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the Delhi–Dehradun Economic Corridor, a 213-km expressway that cuts travel time from over six hours to just 2.5 hours. Built at a cost of Rs 12,000 crore, the project features Asia’s longest wildlife corridor, advanced safety systems, and dedicated spurs to Haridwar and Rishikesh.
